name: WordPress
description: Manage a WordPress site via the REST API: posts, pages, comments, categories, tags, users, media. Uses Application Passwords (WordPress 5.6+). Read and write access — tested live against WordPress 6+ REST API.

credentials_required.label: WordPress Site URL
credentials_required.hint: Base URL of your WordPress site (e.g. https://myblog.com) — no trailing slash. Works with self-hosted WP 5.6+ and most managed hosts.

credentials_required.label: WordPress Username
credentials_required.hint: Your WordPress username (the login name, not the display name). Visible in WP-Admin under Users.

credentials_required.label: WordPress Application Password
credentials_required.hint: Generate in WP-Admin > Users > Profile > Application Passwords. Give it a name like 'n8n-claw', then copy the generated password (spaces are OK). This is NOT your login password.

tools.name: list_posts
tools.description: List posts with optional search, status filter, and pagination

tools.name: get_post
tools.description: Get full content and metadata of a single post by ID

tools.name: create_post
tools.description: Create a new post (draft by default) with title, content, status, categories, tags

tools.name: update_post
tools.description: Update an existing post's title, content, status, categories, or tags

tools.name: delete_post
tools.description: Delete a post (trash by default, or permanently with force=true)

tools.name: list_pages
tools.description: List pages with optional search and status filter

tools.name: get_page
tools.description: Get full content and metadata of a single page by ID

tools.name: create_page
tools.description: Create a new page with title, content, status, and optional parent

tools.name: update_page
tools.description: Update an existing page's title, content, status, or parent

tools.name: delete_page
tools.description: Delete a page (trash by default, or permanently with force=true)

tools.name: list_comments
tools.description: List comments, optionally filtered by post ID and/or moderation status

tools.name: moderate_comment
tools.description: Approve, hold, mark as spam, or trash a comment

tools.name: list_categories
tools.description: List post categories with post counts

tools.name: create_category
tools.description: Create a new category with name, optional description, parent, and slug

tools.name: list_tags
tools.description: List post tags with post counts

tools.name: search
tools.description: Cross-type search across posts, pages, and other content by keyword

tools.name: list_media
tools.description: List media library items (images, videos, documents)

tools.name: upload_media
tools.description: Upload a file (image/document) to the Media Library from a file_ref (File Bridge ID)

author: freddy-schuetz
